item.title: #TLを花いっぱいにしよう #Flower 『草花豆知識』 名前【ノウゼンカズラ】 花言葉➜ 【名声/夢ある人生/栄光…
item.author: アキハル (@akihalu.bsky.social)
item.description:
#TLを花いっぱいにしよう
#Flower
『草花豆知識』

名前【ノウゼンカズラ】
花言葉➜
【名声/夢ある人生/栄光】

概略📗

「中国原産🇨🇳のつる植物🌱で、
平安時代に渡来🚢したと言われています。」

「開花時期は6～9月で、
明るいオレンジ色🟠の、
ラッパ📯のような形をした花を咲かせます。」

「空☁️に向かってファンファーレ♬
を吹いているように見える事から
【名声】などの希望✨にあふれた花言葉がついたそうです。」

「花からは蜜🍯が豊富に分泌され、
メジロやヒヨドリなどの野鳥🐦や、
アゲハチョウ🦋が、おいしい蜜を吸いに寄ってきます。」
item.content:encoded:
#TLを花いっぱいにしよう
#Flower
『草花豆知識』

名前【ノウゼンカズラ】
花言葉➜
【名声/夢ある人生/栄光】

概略📗

「中国原産🇨🇳のつる植物🌱で、
平安時代に渡来🚢したと言われています。」

「開花時期は6～9月で、
明るいオレンジ色🟠の、
ラッパ📯のような形をした花を咲かせます。」

「空☁️に向かってファンファーレ♬
を吹いているように見える事から
【名声】などの希望✨にあふれた花言葉がついたそうです。」

「花からは蜜🍯が豊富に分泌され、
メジロやヒヨドリなどの野鳥🐦や、
アゲハチョウ🦋が、おいしい蜜を吸いに寄ってきます。」

item.title: 最近猫が人間の体にぴったりくっついて寝てくれるんですけど、目が覚めたらこの状態で笑ってしまった 私の頭は尻のところにあっ…

item.description: 最近猫が人間の体にぴったりくっついて寝てくれるんですけど、目が覚めたらこの状態で笑ってしまった　私の頭は尻のところにあった

item.title: ICE is a menace to democracy and its murderous conduct shoul…
item.author: The Verge (@theverge.com)
item.description:
ICE is a menace to democracy and its murderous conduct should be soberly considered. But we should also recognize that these people are weak and sad and ought to be made fun of.

Read more: www.theverge.com/policy/96430...
item.content:encoded:
ICE is a menace to democracy and its murderous conduct should be soberly considered. But we should also recognize that these people are weak and sad and ought to be made fun of.

Read more: www.theverge.com/policy/96430...

item.title: 今日は同居人に1話ネームをチェックしてもらったり、逆に同居人の1話ネームをチェックさせてもらったりした！1話ってほんと難…
item.author: エイタツ (@eitatsu.bsky.social)
item.description: 今日は同居人に1話ネームをチェックしてもらったり、逆に同居人の1話ネームをチェックさせてもらったりした！1話ってほんと難しい、情報の取捨選択と整理と構成に手一杯になってつい感情を忘れがちになる ちゃんと感情を描いて！と助言をもらって本当にその通り…となりました 漫画家と暮らしているの本当にありがたすぎる…ありがとう…
item.content:encoded: 今日は同居人に1話ネームをチェックしてもらったり、逆に同居人の1話ネームをチェックさせてもらったりした！1話ってほんと難しい、情報の取捨選択と整理と構成に手一杯になってつい感情を忘れがちになる ちゃんと感情を描いて！と助言をもらって本当にその通り…となりました 漫画家と暮らしているの本当にありがたすぎる…ありがとう…

item.title: The Epstein files “raise serious questions regarding the ext…
item.author: Forbes (@forbes.com)
item.description: The Epstein files “raise serious questions regarding the extent of the bank’s relationship with Epstein, and your knowledge of these ties,” Warren told Dimon.
item.content:encoded: The Epstein files “raise serious questions regarding the extent of the bank’s relationship with Epstein, and your knowledge of these ties,” Warren told Dimon.

item.title: A rainforest beauty admired for its rich burgundy plumage a…
item.author: Eloise Powers (@elnopower.bsky.social)
item.description:
A rainforest beauty admired for its rich burgundy plumage and brilliant white wings.

The Pompadour Cotinga inhabits the Amazon rainforest across northern South America. Males display striking colors to attract mates, while females alone build nests and raise the young.
📷 B. Sharma
item.content:encoded:
A rainforest beauty admired for its rich burgundy plumage and brilliant white wings.

The Pompadour Cotinga inhabits the Amazon rainforest across northern South America. Males display striking colors to attract mates, while females alone build nests and raise the young.
📷 B. Sharma

item.title: U.S. Sen. Tim Sheehy, who previously ran a company that prov…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
U.S. Sen. Tim Sheehy, who previously ran a company that provides aircraft for fighting wildfires, has proposed ending Forest Service inspections of those aircraft.

One of the company’s aircraft failed an inspection because of a crack in its wing.

(Published June)
item.content:encoded:
U.S. Sen. Tim Sheehy, who previously ran a company that provides aircraft for fighting wildfires, has proposed ending Forest Service inspections of those aircraft.

One of the company’s aircraft failed an inspection because of a crack in its wing.

(Published June)

item.title: Friedrich #Merz hat mehr Worte an Alexander Zverev verloren …
item.author: Robert Fietzke (@robertfietzke.bsky.social)
item.description: Friedrich #Merz hat mehr Worte an Alexander Zverev verloren als zu 5.000 Hitzetoten im ersten Sommermonat.
item.content:encoded: Friedrich #Merz hat mehr Worte an Alexander Zverev verloren als zu 5.000 Hitzetoten im ersten Sommermonat.

item.title: My newly adopted dog is a rescue from an ICE abduction. ICE …
item.author: Linda UWSⓥ (@lindavt.bsky.social)
item.description: My newly adopted dog is a rescue from an ICE abduction. ICE took the family and left the dog running loose on the streets of Houston. After 2 months, a wonderful rescue group were able to get him into a foster home. He is the sweetest,
item.content:encoded: My newly adopted dog is a rescue from an ICE abduction. ICE took the family and left the dog running loose on the streets of Houston. After 2 months, a wonderful rescue group were able to get him into a foster home. He is the sweetest,

item.title: "No one will protect what they don't care about; and no one …
item.author: The Doctor (@drstevenhobbs.bsky.social)
item.description: "No one will protect what they don't care about; and no one will care about what they have never experienced."- Sir David Attenboroug
item.content:encoded: "No one will protect what they don't care about; and no one will care about what they have never experienced."- Sir David Attenboroug

item.title: A 5 year old got her first library card today. I gave her th…
item.author: Paper and Ink (@paperandink.bsky.social)
item.description: A 5 year old got her first library card today. I gave her the receipt and said welcome to our library. Use this as a bookmark. I shook her hand and introduced myself. Gemma is a reader. My heart explodes. We got a club member!
item.content:encoded: A 5 year old got her first library card today. I gave her the receipt and said welcome to our library. Use this as a bookmark. I shook her hand and introduced myself. Gemma is a reader. My heart explodes. We got a club member!
